title: Week of April 13, 2026
summary: This week focused on behind-the-scenes improvements to make OpsPal more reliable and organized. We fixed several platform stability issues that could cause licensing problems and improved our internal skill management system to ensure better performance and consistency across all automation features.

entries.headline: Fixed licensing issues that could cause platform access problems
details: Resolved a problem where license validation could get stuck in a loop, preventing proper platform access

entries.headline: Enhanced automation skills for better performance
details: Updated and organized 98 automation skills to work more reliably
Fixed naming inconsistencies that could affect skill discovery and execution
